name: DSJ & Associates, LLC
description: Legal Nurse Consultant Donna S. Jones with over 45 years experience in critical care, coronary care, respiratory, neurological, medical surgical, and progressive care, specializing in nursing negligence.

name: J.W. Legal Nurse Associates
description: Provides expert medical-legal consulting services to attorneys across Florida, specializing in medical record reviews, standards of care evaluations, chronologies, and summaries for plaintiff and defense.

name: JF Legal Nurse Consultants, LLC
description: Offers medical records review, interpretation, analysis for plaintiff and defense, locates testifying experts, detects tampering, creates demonstrative evidence, evaluates causation and damages.

name: MedView Legal Nurse Consultants
description: Full-service legal nurse consulting firm specializing in medical record review, standards of care analysis, chronologies, and support for litigation to help recover settlements for negligence cases.

name: Palm Beach Legal Nurse Consultants LLC
description: Analyzes and interprets complex medical records, provides litigation support on medical and nursing issues, collaborates with nationwide RNs for consulting and testimony, and renders expert opinions on duty, breach, causation, and damages.

sentiment.label: mixed
